article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.1. Attachment 1 - 2025 Community Contribution Agreement Report (Bby Mountain Safety Reserve) 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to consider: 2025 Burnaby Mountain Safety Fund spending report
briefs.summary: Council will consider a report showing how $6.68 million from the Burnaby Mountain Community Contribution Fund was spent in 2025 on three safety projects, leaving a balance of about $3.32 million.
briefs.action_required: Review the report if your business operates near Burnaby Mountain — these safety upgrades may affect local access and emergency response.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Transportation & Logistics, Professional Services
